title: The Enchanted Island of Madeira

scenes.text: An island where nature crafts breathtaking levadas and cliffs.
This is Madeira, an archipelago in the Atlantic Ocean, part of Portugal.
Madeira is known for its unique network of levadas—irrigation channels created in the 16th century.
Experience dramatic cliffs plunging into crystal-clear waters.
scenes.label: DRAMATIC CLIFFS

scenes.text: Follow for the planet's best-kept secrets.

description: 📍 Madeira, Atlantic Ocean - Portugal. A stunning island with picturesque levadas and soaring cliffs. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
